# Fixture: p5_no_reinstall
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 21.8s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Carolyn! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: The app keeps crashing and I can't see anything

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
Try quitting the app fully and reopening it. If it still keeps crashing, email support@shiftsmart.com with your phone number and let them know what the app is showing — they can help from there.
